_meta.description: Homebrew item library generated by MPMBScriptGen. This file is the bridge between the MPMB script generator and the web sheet viewer.

azeros-shard.name: Azeros' Shard
azeros-shard.description: A jagged crystal that hums faintly with the heat of a passing comet. While attuned, you may add +1 to the spell save DC of any spell you cast that includes a fire or radiant damage component.
azeros-shard.descriptionLong: Long ago, Azeros the First Mage poured a fragment of his comet's perihelion into a focusing crystal. The shard still resonates with that distant fire. As an action, you may shatter the shard to cast Fireball (DC 15) centered on yourself, taking no damage from the blast. The shard reforms 7 days later.
